revision.comment: [[Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2023 October 3#Template:Summarize section]] closed as no consensus ([[WP:XFDC#4.0.13|XFDcloser]])
doing this to force an update since the ambox redirect is messing with things
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text: {{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= <!--{{Overly detailed}} begin-->{{Ambox | name = Overly detailed | subst = <includeonly>{{subst:substcheck}}</includeonly> | type = style | class = ambox-overly_detailed | sect = {{{1|}}} | issue = '''may contain an excessive amount of intricate detail that may interest only a particular audience'''. {{#if:{{{details|}}}|'''Specifically, {{{details}}}'''.}} | fix = Please help by {{#if:{{{nosplit|}}}||[[Wikipedia:Content forking#Article_spinoffs: .22Summary style.22 meta-articles and summary sections|spinning off]] or [[Wikipedia:Handling trivia#Recommendations for handling trivia|relocating]] any relevant information, and}} removing excessive detail that may be against [[Wikipedia:What Wikipedia is not|Wikipedia's inclusion policy]]. | removalnotice = yes | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = Wikipedia articles that are excessively detailed | all = All articles that are excessively detailed }}{{DMCA|Wikipedia articles with style issues|from|{{{date|}}}|All articles with style issues|Wikipedia articles with style issues by month}}<!--{{Overly detailed}} end--> }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> [[sn:Overly detailed]] [[Category:Templates]]

{{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= <!--{{Overly detailed}} begin-->{{Ambox | name = Overly detailed | subst = <includeonly>{{subst:substcheck}}</includeonly> | type = style | class = ambox-overly_detailed | sect = {{{1|}}} | issue = '''may contain an excessive amount of intricate detail that may interest only a particular audience'''. {{#if:{{{details|}}}|'''Specifically, {{{details}}}'''.}} | fix = Please help by {{#if:{{{nosplit|}}}||[[Wikipedia:Content forking#Article_spinoffs: .22Summary style.22 meta-articles and summary sections|spinning off]] or [[Wikipedia:Handling trivia#Recommendations for handling trivia|relocating]] any relevant information, and}} removing excessive detail that may be against [[Wikipedia:What Wikipedia is not|Wikipedia's inclusion policy]]. | removalnotice = yes | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = Wikipedia articles that are excessively detailed | all = All articles that are excessively detailed }}{{DMCA|Wikipedia articles with style issues|from|{{{date|}}}|All articles with style issues|Wikipedia articles with style issues by month}}<!--{{Overly detailed}} end--> }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> [[Category:sn_crud|TESTOverly detailed]] [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23524127410|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= <!--{{Overly detailed}} begin-->{{Ambox | name = Overly detailed | subst = <includeonly>{{subst:substcheck}}</includeonly> | type = style | class = ambox-overly_detailed | sect = {{{1|}}} | issue = '''may contain an excessive amount of intricate detail that may interest only a particular audience'''. {{#if:{{{details|}}}|'''Specifically, {{{details}}}'''.}} | fix = Please help by {{#if:{{{nosplit|}}}||[[Wikipedia:Content forking#Article_spinoffs: .22Summary style.22 meta-articles and summary sections|spinning off]] or [[Wikipedia:Handling trivia#Recommendations for handling trivia|relocating]] any relevant information, and}} removing excessive detail that may be against [[Wikipedia:What Wikipedia is not|Wikipedia's inclusion policy]]. | removalnotice = yes | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = Wikipedia articles that are excessively detailed | all = All articles that are excessively detailed }}{{DMCA|Wikipedia articles with style issues|from|{{{date|}}}|All articles with style issues|Wikipedia articles with style issues by month}}<!--{{Overly detailed}} end--> }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:sn_crud|TESTOverly detailed]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

{{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= <!--{{Overly detailed}} begin-->{{Ambox | name = Overly detailed | subst = <includeonly>{{subst:substcheck}}</includeonly> | type = style | class = ambox-overly_detailed | sect = {{{1|}}} | issue = '''may contain an excessive amount of intricate detail that may interest only a particular audience'''. {{#if:{{{details|}}}|'''Specifically, {{{details}}}'''.}} | fix = Please help by {{#if:{{{nosplit|}}}||[[Wikipedia:Content forking#Article_spinoffs: .22Summary style.22 meta-articles and summary sections|spinning off]] or [[Wikipedia:Handling trivia#Recommendations for handling trivia|relocating]] any relevant information, and}} removing excessive detail that may be against [[Wikipedia:What Wikipedia is not|Wikipedia's inclusion policy]]. | removalnotice = yes | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = Wikipedia articles that are excessively detailed | all = All articles that are excessively detailed }}{{DMCA|Wikipedia articles with style issues|from|{{{date|}}}|All articles with style issues|Wikipedia articles with style issues by month}}<!--{{Overly detailed}} end--> }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]

revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Sn crud]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24296132115|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= <!--{{Overly detailed}} begin-->{{Ambox | name = Overly detailed | subst = <includeonly>{{subst:substcheck}}</includeonly> | type = style | class = ambox-overly_detailed | sect = {{{1|}}} | issue = '''may contain an excessive amount of intricate detail that may interest only a particular audience'''. {{#if:{{{details|}}}|'''Specifically, {{{details}}}'''.}} | fix = Please help by {{#if:{{{nosplit|}}}||[[Wikipedia:Content forking#Article_spinoffs: .22Summary style.22 meta-articles and summary sections|spinning off]] or [[Wikipedia:Handling trivia#Recommendations for handling trivia|relocating]] any relevant information, and}} removing excessive detail that may be against [[Wikipedia:What Wikipedia is not|Wikipedia's inclusion policy]]. | removalnotice = yes | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = Wikipedia articles that are excessively detailed | all = All articles that are excessively detailed }}{{DMCA|Wikipedia articles with style issues|from|{{{date|}}}|All articles with style issues|Wikipedia articles with style issues by month}}<!--{{Overly detailed}} end--> }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24957526818|time triggered pipeline]]
